(1/9)

Provides a clear and concise summary of the issue or challenge being solve. Describe the service detail. E.g. we provice AC repair service


(2/9)

Clearly define unique attributes, functionalities, or benefits that distinguish the service from others in the market.


   
(3/9)

List down highlights the key advantages and value that customers or users will gain from utilizing the service.


   
(4/9)

Describe why a particular solution or approach is the most suitable for a specific service. This includes explaining how the solution meets the service's unique needs, improves efficiency, addresses pain points, enhances performance, and aligns with the overall goals of the service.


(5/9)

   
(6/9)

Provide detailed information about the exact place where the service is provided.


   
(7/9)

Provides a detailed overview of the services and products offered to meet customer needs.


   
(8/9)

Add an additional file related to the service to provide more information to help the customer better understand the product/service.


   
(9/9)

Suggests a personalized approach to related product recommendations.

Note: Regardless of whether you sell them or not. Type the words, separated by commas.
